verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 is an integral transmembrane protein resident in the trans-Golgi network (TGN) and late-endosomal system. Its canonical localization is to endomembrane compartments, not the plasma membrane. No documented PM pool, ectodomain shedding, surface-directed therapeutic engagement, covalent surface anchoring, or cell-state–induced surfacing has been reported. It is not a stable partner of PM-anchored proteins. The protein remains endomembrane-resident under baseline and non-baseline conditions.
